Shadow Arena: Action RPG

Enter the arena as a legendary hero in this 2D action RPG! Battle through waves of enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character. Use strategic combinations of skills with different cooldowns and mana costs to overcome increasingly challenging foes. Collect gear drops to enhance your stats and unlock powerful skill upgrades. Your goal: survive all enemy waves and defeat the final boss to claim victory!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump | Z: Basic attack (generates mana) | Space: Skill 1 - Power Strike (15 mana, 5s cooldown) | Shift: Skill 2 - Whirlwind (25 mana, 8s cooldown) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

No other random seeding. - Use ES6 syntax with proper imports and exports at the top of the file where they are used. No dynamic imports or require() imports. - Maintain `p.logs` as write-only; log game_info, inputs, player_info with proper initialization and updates during the game loop. No Node.js style require imports. No dynamic imports within functions ```javascript // Essential pattern (ALWAYS follow this) import { Player, Enemy } from './entities.js'; import { checkCollision, applyPhysics } from './physics.js'; import { gameState, CANVAS_WIDTH } from './globals.js'; // Example function with proper dependencies function createPlayer(x, y) { const player = new Player(x, y); gameState.player = player; gameState.entities.push(player); return player; } ``` - State Management: - Implement `function getGameState()` and attach it to `window`. Shadow Arena: Action RPG

Enter the arena as a legendary hero in this 2D action RPG! Battle through waves of enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character. Use strategic combinations of skills with different cooldowns and mana costs to overcome increasingly challenging foes. Collect gear drops to enhance your stats and unlock powerful skill upgrades. Your goal: survive all enemy waves and defeat the final boss to claim victory!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump | Z: Basic attack (generates mana) | Space: Skill 1 - Power Strike (15 mana, 5s cooldown) | Shift: Skill 2 - Whirlwind (25 mana, 8s cooldown) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
